AllocationRecord.title: Allocation Record
AllocationRecord.description: A record of a single machine allocation session.

date.description: The timestamp when the allocation was saved.

allocations.description: A map of staff names to the number of machines they were assigned.

Staff.title: Staff
Staff.description: A staff member who can be allocated machines.

id.description: Unique identifier for the staff member.

region.description: The region the staff member belongs to.

active.description: Whether the staff member is currently part of the rotation.

/allocations/{recordId}.description: Collection of all machine allocation history.
